name: LLM Prompt Playground
description: An interactive sandbox for comparing LLM prompt strategies side by side — temperature, system prompts, few-shot examples, and structured outputs.

name: Code Review Bot
description: A GitHub Action that analyzes PR descriptions and code changes to suggest additional test cases, edge cases, and documentation improvements.

name: Viz Explorer
description: Visual experiments with D3.js and Canvas — animated sorting algorithms, pathfinding visualization, and graph traversal demos.
